caption_text: The composition formula · four inputs meet at a single mouth

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

convergence_outer_angle_note: pair-consistency ruling 2026-07-14: the two convergence entries share the gathered-seed envelope (pitch 148, margin 86); the hand file's own 20.6deg approach (pitch 110, margin ~90) is the superseded dress — the SELF law still grades the specimen at 20.6.
